title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/02/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate downward. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at805 yuan/mt, down 0.8% for the day. Traders sold goods based on market trends, while steel mills purchased as needed, with moderate market transaction sentiment.
